## ensureConfigInitialized() function

Ensures the global config singleton is initialized. If already initialized, this is a no-op. Otherwise calls initializeConfig() with default settings.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function ensureConfigInitialized(): Config
```

**Returns:**

[Config](./stripe-cli-plugin-bootstrap.config.md)
